task_completion.description: Agent successfully logs into the OpenEMR system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the OpenEMR dashboard, Flow Board, or main menu after the login screen.

task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Calendar module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the Calendar view (Day, Week, or Month grid) within the OpenEMR interface.

task_completion.description: Agent locates the appointment for patient Jayson Fadel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the cursor hovering over or clicking an appointment block labeled 'Jayson Fadel' (or 'Fadel, Jayson') on the calendar.

task_completion.description: Agent changes the appointment status to 'Arrived' ('@').
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the 'Edit Event' or appointment details modal where the 'Status' dropdown is set to '@' or 'Arrived'.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the changes and the calendar reflects the new status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the calendar view where Jayson Fadel's appointment block now displays the '@' symbol or indicates 'Arrived' status.

integrity.description: Agent uses the web GUI and not terminal commands to update the status.
integrity.visual_evidence: No evidence of terminal/console usage or SQL command injection.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the actual OpenEMR web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenEMR browser interface with standard styling, not a text editor or mock-up.

integrity.description: Agent navigates menus rather than pasting deep links.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the mouse cursor moving through menus or clicking calendar elements rather than the URL bar changing abruptly to a result page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Jayson Fadel. Date of Birth: 1992-06-30. The target status code for 'Arrived' is '@'.
